data.body: SESSION CHECKPOINT (2026-07-09). Delivered this session: 9622 (reconciler safety wiring) fully DONE — merged to main via Gerrit change 433, closed with signed completion verdict. B1/a118 (Phase-3 baseline consumer swap) CODE fully DONE — merged via Gerrit change 434 (both gates +1); ticket stays in_progress for the 3+hr OPERATIONAL tail. Epic ace2 remains in_progress. Remaining children: a118 operational validation (>=10 clean shadow passes ~3+hrs + live heal + flag flip), d01e/D1 (comprehensive live Jira matrix, hours, not started), eca4 (path-based _load -> package imports, broad reconciler-loader refactor, do LAST — note: all reconciler unit tests use spec_from_file_location loading that eca4 changes, so it needs a coordinated sweep). Epic cannot fully close in one continuous session due to these wall-clock gates. Recommended next order: a118 operational -> d01e -> eca4, then close epic ace2 + confirm full stack submitted.
